## What changed

Describe the portfolio update in a few clear sentences.

## Why

Explain the visitor, recruiter, or business outcome this improves.

## Review checklist

- [ ] Checked the homepage and affected case-study pages
- [ ] Checked desktop and mobile layouts
- [ ] Tested keyboard navigation and visible focus states
- [ ] Confirmed images include meaningful alternative text
- [ ] Confirmed links and calls to action work
- [ ] Ran the available build or tests
- [ ] Reviewed spelling, project outcomes, and metadata

## Screenshots

Add before-and-after screenshots when the change affects the interface.
